value_signal: $10,000 cash prizes, 10 GB of free Backblaze B2 storage to start, and GMI Cloud credits for the first 270 eligible participants.
eligibility_or_region_notes: Official blog describes an online competition for developers building generative media apps; check the linked hackathon page for any final eligibility restrictions before any submission work.
deadline_or_currentness: Registration and submissions run June 22 through August 3, 2026 (5 pm ET); winners are announced August 12.
best_fit_track: Generative media pipeline / provenance-aware media workflow
evidence_gate: Submission receipt plus later judging, verification, and prize or usable-credit delivery proof.
ai_can_do_next: Draft a small media pipeline that turns public AI Monkey proof assets into a demo reel, image set, or provenance-aware generation workflow.
human_must_do_next: Human account owner must confirm fit, register if eligible, and submit the project through the official hackathon flow.
automation_boundary: No login, submission, account creation, passwords, OTP, private keys, KYC, tax, bank, wallet, or private data handling.
why_this_is_not_income_yet: The prize pool and storage credits are real, but no submission, ranking, verification, or payout has been confirmed.
suggested_next_check: If the project can truthfully be framed as a generative-media workflow, draft the smallest submission path and proof checklist now.

income_gate.rule: Counts only after verified submission, prize delivery, or usable value delivery.
